sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9613" key="a)ntemfra/ttw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεμ-φράττω</orth>, <sense id="n9613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">obstruct,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:441:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">441.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
